content: TASK-067 checkpoint done: Prototype map routing now preserves perpendicular incidence at source and target component sides. Each edge leaves its source side through a short outward orthogonal stub, routes between the outside stubs, and enters the target side through a matching perpendicular stub before buildEdgePaths() applies overlap offsets/gaps. This brings Prototype map endpoint behavior closer to Overview's side-safe routing while keeping previous parallel-line deconfliction and the borderless map viewport. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, and npm run build passed. TASK-056 performance remains open; browser reload remains noticeably heavy on dense Prototype maps.
